title: Thief steals opponent equip on summon

card.rawText: When summoned, steal 1 equip card from your opponent's side of the field and equip it to this card. Send the stolen card to its original owner's cemetery if this card leaves the field, changes control, or this effect is negated.

effect.value: Steal and equip to this card

plan.title: Thief steals opponent equip on summon
plan.summary: When summoned, verify Thief steals one equip card from opponent field and equips it to itself.

notes: Opponent has an equip card on field for Thief to steal.

When summoned, steal 1 equip card from your opponent's side of the field and equip it to this card. Send the stolen card to its original owner's cemetery if this card leaves the field, changes control, or this effect is negated.

manualVerification: Verify against card text: When summoned, steal 1 equip card from your opponent's side of the field and equip it to this card. Send the stolen card to its original owner's cemetery if this card leaves the field, changes control, or this effect is negated.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
